label: Default follow-up
text: Get your shoes on and come to the car.

existingTranslations.translation: The car is ready, and shoes are part of getting out the door.
It looks like shoes and heading to the car are the next part.
The driveway is waiting, and shoes help with getting there.
I wonder what would make shoes and the walk to the car feel easier.

translations.translation: The shoes are by the door, and the car is out front.

text: Please come to the bathroom, brush your teeth, and bring your dinosaur to bed.

existingTranslations.translation: The bathroom is the next stop, and the dinosaur can head to bed after teeth are done.
It looks like toothbrush time came before the dinosaur bedtime expedition.
The sink is ready, and the dinosaur can travel to bed when teeth are sorted out.
I wonder how the dinosaur bedtime route goes once teeth are taken care of.

translations.translation: The bathroom light is on, and the toothbrush is out. It looks like the dinosaur is ready for its cozy spot in bed when we're done here.
Toothpaste is on the brush! Then it's often a nice adventure for the dinosaur to find its special place in bed.
Brushing teeth happens first, and then the dinosaur gets to settle in for sleep. We could make sure its bed is ready!
There's the toothbrush! And the dinosaur often enjoys snuggling in bed right after all the teeth are clean.

label: Fewer Words follow-up
text: Wash your hands and come to the kitchen for lunch.

existingTranslations.translation: Hands first, then the kitchen for lunch.
The sink is next, and lunch is waiting in the kitchen.
Looks like handwashing and the kitchen go together right now.
Lunch is nearly ready once hands are sorted out.

label: Multi-part follow-up
text: Please come to the bathroom, get your pajamas on, and bring your book to bed.

existingTranslations.translation: The bathroom is the first stop, and pajamas plus a book seem to be part of the path to bed.
It looks like bathroom, pajamas, and book are all teaming up for bedtime.
I could use a second set of eyes on the bedtime order: bathroom, pajamas, then book to bed.
The bed seems to be waiting on a bathroom stop, pajamas, and a book.

translations.translation: The bathroom light is on, and the pajamas are out; the book can come with us to bed.
Getting ready for bed, the next stop is the bathroom, and the pajamas and book are part of that journey.
Those pajamas look ready for you after a quick stop in the bathroom, and your book can join you in bed.
The bathroom, pajamas, and your book all seem to be teaming up for bedtime tonight.

The path to bed goes through the bathroom, then involves pajamas, and a good book to finish.
